title: Chapter 1: The Rainy Encounter
content:
It was a stormy night. The rain was pouring down hard, and I was walking home alone after work. Suddenly, a tall shadow emerged from the alleyway...

I froze in place, my heart pounding. The figure stood still for a moment, then slowly stepped into the dim streetlight. His eyes glowed faintly golden, and his shoulders were broad and muscular. I could hear a low growl rumbling from his chest.
